title: Mushroom Fields
description: Now new mushrooms are being added to Minecraft
body:
Now new mushrooms are being added to Minecraft, such as: a large mushroom, a chanterelle mushroom and a glowing mushroom.

Big Mushroom and Mushroom Chanterelle can be found not only in the Mushroom biome, but also in environments and forests. Now you can fry mushrooms, except red and glowing ones, and eat them.
A special glowing mushroom can be found in a new biome - the glowing mushroom biome, which is a blue environment with glowing mushrooms

The new mushroom species also have a large version that can be found in the mushroom biome, as well as a large version of the glowing mushroom in the glowing mushroom biome.
This mushroom bionome will become brighter and more diverse, because in addition to new, older versions of mushrooms, new variants will also appear.

From wheat and cocoa beans you can craft a chocolate mushroom, which can serve as an alternative to cookies.
